recommendations.title: In My Skin
recommendations.overview: After a disfiguring leg injury, a young woman develops an unsettling secret relationship with her own body in which pain is pleasure, mutilation is love and hungers of the flesh have a mind of their own.

recommendations.title: Don't Look Back
recommendations.overview: Panic attacks and memory loss signal the plight of a writer whose body is inexplicably being taken over by another woman.

recommendations.title: Savageland
recommendations.overview: When a small town near the Arizona-Mexico border is wiped out overnight, suspicion falls on the lone survivor. But a roll of photos the survivor took that night tells a different story.
recommendations.director: David Whelan, Phil Guidry, Simon Herbert

recommendations.overview: A lone drifter suffering from partial memory loss accepts a job to look after a psychologically troubled woman in an abandoned house on an isolated island.
